sentences.arabic: عَلِمَ الفَرِيقُ أَنَّ رَانِيَا تَرَقَّتْ فِي العَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Tim je saznao da je Ranija napredovala na poslu.
sentences.translationEn: The team learned that Rania got a promotion at work.

sentences.translation: Otišli su k njoj i čestitali joj.
sentences.translationEn: They went to her and congratulated her.
They said to her «Congratulations on the promotion».

sentences.translation: Ranija se nasmiješila i zahvalila svima.
Odlučili su slaviti zajedno u restoranu.
sentences.translationEn: They decided to celebrate together at the restaurant.
